analysis: The project is a static website with a black hole theme. The HTML structure includes sections for navigation, main content, and interactive elements. The CSS file is incomplete and needs to be updated with a cosmic theme, including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The JavaScript file has syntax errors and incomplete functionality for mobile menu toggle and slide show features.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a cosmic theme, including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
Fix syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented.
